stories.title: Full hearts, empty kegs, can't lose: Scotland's Tartan Army takes over World Cup
stories.summary: Scotland's Tartan Army has been one of the stories of the 2026 World Cup so far, drinking its way through Boston and bringing bonhomie, passion and national pride after nearly 30 years away from the tournament.

stories.title: Brunson slams skeptics as Knicks revel in parade
stories.summary: Jalen Brunson finally hit back at his skeptics as the Knicks and millions of fans celebrated the franchise's first NBA championship in 53 years with a parade Thursday.

stories.title: Sources: MLB proposes amateur-entry overhaul
stories.summary: MLB's proposed changes include cutting amateur signing bonuses by more than $150M, making high school players ineligible for the draft and instituting an international draft.

stories.title: Ex-Iona player ruled ineligible over point shaving...
stories.summary: A former Iona men's basketball player was ruled ineligible by the NCAA for his alleged role in a point-shaving scheme.

stories.title: NHL clears Babcock to coach amid Oilers' interest
stories.summary: Following an investigation into his brief tenure with the Blue Jackets in 2023, the NHL has cleared Mike Babcock to coach again amid the Oilers' interest in hiring him.
